figures.caption: Fig. 4: Failure cases. Selected frames from mixed bronchoscopy domains showing false positive and false negative cases. Images obtained from [16].
Fig. 3: Challenges. Selected frames from an in-vivo bronchoscopy illustrating stable detection results throughout the sequence. Video material is originated from [16].

Fig. 1: Bronchoscopy video frame augmented by bounding boxes with bronchial orifice detections (1a). Anatomical model of an airway tree comprising the first 4 branching generations (1b; image partly adapted from [6]).
